name: xMatters Incident Management API
what_it_does: xMatters REST API for digital operations management and incident orchestration. Enables AI agents to trigger alert notifications, query on-call schedules, retrieve incident data, manage escalations, and integrate xMatters into automated incident response workflows. xMatters connects monitoring tools to the right people faster during incidents.
use_cases: Triggering targeted incident notifications from automated alerting agents
Querying on-call schedules and rotation data from incident routing agents
Retrieving incident response history and MTTD/MTTR metrics from SRE analytics agents
Integrating xMatters notifications into CI/CD deployment failure response agents
best_when: A DevOps or SRE team using xMatters wants AI agents to automatically route incidents, trigger targeted notifications, and integrate on-call data into automated incident response workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Incident notification systems can cause alert fatigue if misused. Automated notification triggers require proper escalation logic and testing.

auth.notes: xMatters supports HTTP Basic Auth, API keys, and OAuth 2.0. OAuth recommended for production integrations. Role-based access control.

pricing.paid_tiers: Stakeholder, Foundation, Advanced, and Enterprise plans
pricing.notes: xMatters is now part of Everbridge. Free plan for small teams. API access on all plans.

performance.rate_limits: xMatters API: rate limits per account; contact support for limits

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Automated notifications require proper escalation logic to avoid alert fatigue
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
xMatters is now part of Everbridge — verify API endpoint URLs haven't changed
On-call schedule data is time-sensitive — cache with short TTL for routing accuracy
Inbound integration keys (API keys for triggering) are separate from user API keys
agent_readiness.security_notes: Incident notification system with on-call contact data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth recommended. AU data residency for APAC.

security_score_components.security_notes: On-call contact data and incident notification system. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth with RBAC.
